sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available. 320x240 raster graphics rendering.

special_mechanics.name: Pinball Physics Simulation
special_mechanics.description: Core pinball table mechanics with ball physics, flippers, bumpers, and ramps. Game features scrollable 2D top-down view of individual pinball tables.

tier_notes: Tier 3: Pinball game with no documented movement parameters for player character physics. Paradigm is pinball (ball simulation), not character action. Wikipedia source contains only general game info, development history, and commercial reception. No technical physics documentation available.
